summary: Validated the new _redirects file emitted by build-static.js for Cloudflare Pages deployment fix. Ran build, inspected filesystem output, and executed 39 pytest checks (16 new for _redirects + 23 regression). All 39 passed.
action_items: User must redeploy /app/frontend/_redirects to Cloudflare Pages for the production fix to take effect (out-of-environment step).
critical_code_review_comments: build-static.js correctly emits 301! force redirects BEFORE 200 rewrites (first-match-wins ordering — Cloudflare Pages spec).
Each rule uses the required 2-space separator and file ends with a single trailing newline (no stray blank/comment lines).
Rule generation is derived from the ROUTES table, so future new slugs will automatically get their case-fold + rewrite pair — good.

Minor observation (not a bug): the 200 rewrites emit `<slug>/index.html` as destination which is Cloudflare-Pages-canonical. Netlify would also accept the same file format, so the output is portable across both static hosts.

Note: production URL (https://californiacooperagehottubs.com) cannot be tested from this environment — verification of the actual production fix requires the user to redeploy and rerun the production probes.
seed_data_creation: Ran `node build-static.js` in /app/frontend which produced /app/frontend/_redirects (20 rules), sitemap.xml (6 urls), and 6 pre-rendered HTML files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New test file /app/backend/tests/test_redirects_file.py auto-runs `node build-static.js` at module scope, then filesystem-inspects /app/frontend/_redirects and pre-rendered HTML. Existing /app/backend/tests/test_jsonld_offers.py hits the preview host (https://cba431d2-...preview.emergentagent.com) for regression. Both files combined form the regression suite going forward. Production Cloudflare Pages URL is out-of-scope for this environment.

test_coverage_detail.301_rules_cover_all_5_uppercase_slugs_x2: PASS (/CR1, /CR2, /CR3, /WARRANTY, /FIND-A-DEALER with and without trailing slash)
test_coverage_detail.prerendered_html_still_has_offers_block: PASS on /cr1, /cr2, /cr3 (parseable JSON, priceSpecification, seller, canonical url)
test_coverage_detail.preview_regression_all_previous_23_check: PASS (Product offers on /cr1|cr2|cr3, no Product schema on non-product, /CR1 -> /cr1 301, sitemap OK)
